name: Firewall Port Restriction Policy
description: Inbound/outbound ports must be explicitly approved; no permanent open ports to untrusted zones.

name: Data Encryption Policy
description: Data at rest and in transit must use approved encryption (TLS 1.2+, AES-256).

name: Admin Access Policy
description: Administrative access must be time-bound, MFA-protected, and justified.

name: Logging and Monitoring Policy
description: Security-relevant events must be logged centrally and retained for 12 months.

name: Password Complexity Policy
description: Credentials must meet complexity, rotation, and MFA requirements.

name: Network Exposure Policy
description: Sensitive systems must not be exposed to public or untrusted network zones.

name: Data Retention Policy
description: Personal and financial data must be retained and purged per the retention schedule.

name: Privileged Access Review Policy
description: Privileged access must be reviewed at least quarterly and extensions re-justified.

name: Customer Data Protection Policy
description: Customer PII must be protected with encryption, access control, and minimization.

name: Secure Configuration Policy
description: Systems must follow hardened baseline configurations; deviations require waivers.

name: Third-Party Vendor Access Policy
description: Vendor and third-party access must be time-bound, justified, and revoked on contract expiry.

name: Mobile Device Security Policy
description: Mobile devices accessing corporate systems must be enrolled in MDM and meet security baselines.

name: Vulnerability Management Policy
description: Critical vulnerabilities must be patched within 30 days; exceptions require formal risk acceptance.

name: Change Management Policy
description: All production changes must follow the CAB process; emergency changes require post-hoc approval.

name: Business Continuity Policy
description: Critical systems must maintain RPO < 4h and RTO < 8h; deviations require formal risk acceptance.
